pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh where AUDIO_FILE is defined and generated.
Verified from export_result.sh where SCENE_FILE is defined.
verifier.py checks for scene_size_bytes > 100 (which is ~0.1 KB), contradicting the claim of 1 KB.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires importing a synthetic 5-second 1kHz sine wave audio file from '/home/ga/OpenToonz/audio/reference_dialogue.wav' and saving the OpenToonz scene to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/audio_sync_scene/audio_sync_scene.tnz'. The verifier requires the scene file to be greater than 100 bytes and contain references to the audio file and sound column tags.
